title: aeonium × velutinum
intro: Aeonium × velutinum, also known as the Velvet Aeonium or Velvet Pinch Plant, is a hybrid succulent plant species that is a cross between Aeonium canariense and Aeonium arboreum. This plant is valued for its thick, fleshy leaves with a powdery, velvety coating that provides protection from excessive moisture and temperature fluctuations. Aeonium × velutinum has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and skin irritations, due to its medicinal properties such as antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. Herbal preparations of Aeonium × velutinum are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are said to provide health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing.
